name: vscode-juicer
description: Standalone VSCode Juicer extension with editor effects plus a companion renderer injector for Copilot Chat and other webview-backed inputs.

commands.title: VSCode Juicer: Open Chat Renderer Settings
VSCode Juicer: Apply Preset (Juicy Subtle v1)

vscodeJuicer.presets.description: Choose the visual preset used when VSCode Juicer is active

enumDescriptions: Show the combo in the editor. The true 'VSCode Juicer' experience
Use the status bar. A more subdued experience.
Use the default value. May be overiddent by other settings.
vscodeJuicer.combo.location.description: Control where all the combo information is visible.

vscodeJuicer.combo.threshold.description: The combo needed to activate JUICED!!! and start shaking and exploding the screen. If the value is 0, VSCode Juicer will always be active.

vscodeJuicer.combo.timeout.description: The number of seconds before the combo resets. If the value is 0, the timer will never reset.

enumDescriptions: Use the default value. May be overridden by other settings.
vscodeJuicer.combo.counterEnabled.description: Control whether the combo counter is visible.

vscodeJuicer.combo.counterSize.description: Control the size of the Combo Meter text

enumDescriptions: Use the default value. May be overridden by other settings.
vscodeJuicer.combo.timerEnabled.description: Control whether the combo timer is visible.

vscodeJuicer.shake.enabled.description: Set to false to disable shaking while typing

vscodeJuicer.shake.intensity.description: The intensity with which the screen shakes

vscodeJuicer.explosions.enabled.description: Set to false to disable explosions while typing

vscodeJuicer.explosions.maxExplosions.description: The maximum number of simultaneous explosions

vscodeJuicer.explosions.size.description: The size of the explosions. For value X, the height is set to X rem and the width to X ch

vscodeJuicer.explosions.frequency.description: The number of key strokes needed to trigger an explosion. 2 means every second keystroke will explode, 1 means every key stroke.

vscodeJuicer.explosions.offset.description: The vertical offset of the explosions. Increasing it will move the explosions up, decreasing it will move them down.

vscodeJuicer.explosions.customExplosions.markdownDescription: This value will go into the 'url()' part of a background image. It should be a base64 encoded gif or **https** URL _without_ quotes.

enumDescriptions: Uses the gifs as a mask to let the background color come through (similar to atom power mode)
vscodeJuicer.explosions.backgroundMode.description: Affects the css properties used to display the gif.

enumDescriptions: Resume playing it from its previous point
Restart the gif each time it is shown. This is useful when you have multiple visible gifs, but may reduce performance
vscodeJuicer.explosions.gifMode.description: Control the 'playback' mode of the gifs.

vscodeJuicer.explosions.explosionOrder.description: Determines how the explosions are cycled. 'random' (default) picks from the list randomly. 'sequential' goes through the list in order, and a number will select the explosion at that (zero based)index in the list

vscodeJuicer.explosions.duration.description: Determines how long an explosion lasts (in milliseconds). Set to 0 for it to last forever.

vscodeJuicer.explosions.customCss.description: Set custom CSS that will apply to the explosion element.

vscodeJuicer.chat.enabled.description: Enable renderer-side chat/webview effects managed by this extension.

vscodeJuicer.chat.comboDecayMs.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before combo resets.

vscodeJuicer.chat.comboShakeThreshold.description: Combo count required before shake triggers.

vscodeJuicer.chat.particlesPerKeystroke.description: Particles spawned per qualifying key press.

vscodeJuicer.chat.particleSaturation.description: Used only when text-color-follow is disabled.

vscodeJuicer.chat.particleLightness.description: Used only when text-color-follow is disabled.

vscodeJuicer.chat.particleFollowTextColo.description: Use active editor/chat text color for particles.

vscodeJuicer.chat.shakeDurationMs.description: Single shake burst duration in milliseconds.

vscodeJuicer.chat.shakeLoop.description: Loop shake animation while combo is active.

vscodeJuicer.chat.hitCounterEnabled.description: Show floating hit counter near caret.

vscodeJuicer.chat.hitCounterOffsetX.description: Horizontal hit counter offset from caret.

vscodeJuicer.chat.hitCounterOffsetY.description: Vertical hit counter offset from caret.

vscodeJuicer.chat.countNavigationKeys.description: Count backspace, enter, tab and delete toward combo.

vscodeJuicer.chat.anchorMode.description: Use caret anchor first or always pointer.

vscodeJuicer.chat.targetSelectors.description: Selectors used to detect tracked typing surfaces.

vscodeJuicer.enableStatusBarComboCounter.description: Set to false to disable showing the combo in the statusbar
vscodeJuicer.enableStatusBarComboCounter.markdownDeprecationMessage: Use `vscodeJuicer.combo.location` and `vscodeJuicer.combo.counterEnabled` instead. This will be removed in a future version.

vscodeJuicer.enableStatusBarComboTimer.description: Set to false to disable showing the timer in the statusbar
vscodeJuicer.enableStatusBarComboTimer.markdownDeprecationMessage: Use `vscodeJuicer.combo.location` and `vscodeJuicer.combo.timerEnabled` instead. This will be removed in a future version.
